name: clankers-hash
description: Cryptographic hash and encoding utilities — compute SHA-256, MD5, Base64, Hex conversions without spawning external processes

tool_definitions.name: hash_text
tool_definitions.description: Compute a cryptographic hash of the given text. Supports SHA-256 (default) and MD5 algorithms. Returns the hex-encoded hash digest.

tool_definitions.name: encode_text
tool_definitions.description: Encode or decode text using Base64 or Hex encoding. Use 'encode' direction to encode, 'decode' to decode.

text.description: The text to encode or decode

direction.description: Whether to encode or decode (default: encode)
